dailyTasks.title: Introduction to JavaScript
dailyTasks.description: Learn the basics of JavaScript: variables, data types, operators, and control structures.

dailyTasks.title: JavaScript Functions and Scope
dailyTasks.description: Understand functions, scopes, and closures in JavaScript. Practice writing simple functions.

dailyTasks.title: JavaScript Objects and Arrays
dailyTasks.description: Explore objects and arrays, their methods, and manipulation techniques.

dailyTasks.title: Introduction to React
dailyTasks.description: Learn the fundamentals of React, including components, JSX, and props.

dailyTasks.title: State and Lifecycle in React
dailyTasks.description: Understand state management in React and lifecycle methods. Build a simple counter application.

dailyTasks.title: Handling Events and Forms in React
dailyTasks.description: Learn how to handle events and manage form inputs in React applications.

dailyTasks.title: Build a Simple React App
dailyTasks.description: Combine your knowledge to create a simple React application, implementing all concepts learned.
